description: Managed parent workflow authored in the step-addressed shape while the explicit workflowCalls compatibility path still invokes a worker-only review workflow and returns the result to a later step.

prompts.divedraPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start draft-write first, then wait for the workflow-call review result before apply-review runs.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work only on the current node responsibility and return concise business JSON.
